response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed systems experience, with notable roles at Meta and Google in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling. However, his fintech background is limited, and while he has led teams, his scale (e.g., 10 to 30+ people) is not explicitly demonstrated. His open-source and event-driven platform work shows architectural aptitude, but lacks direct experience with agentic AI systems in regulated, high-stakes environments like fintech.
strengths: Extensive backend and distributed systems expertise (event streaming, microservices, real-time systems)
Demonstrated leadership in scaling engineering teams and improving development practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) at Google
concerns: Limited direct fintech experience (credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance)
No clear track record of leading teams from 10 to 30+ people in a fintech or high-stakes commercial environment
Agentic AI production experience is not explicitly highlighted; work at Google is more infrastructure-focused than agentic systems
